title: quercus tardifolia
intro: Quercus tardifolia, also known as the late yellow oak, is a deciduous tree species native to Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Quercus tardifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea and extracts, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
